name: Tihar (Festival of Lights)
traditions: Five days honoring crows, dogs, cows, oxen, and siblings; oil lamps and candles; Deusi-Bhailo singing; rangoli; card games.
historicalBackground: Tihar is Nepal's version of Diwali but includes unique days for honoring animals. Kukur Tihar (Dog Day) has gained global attention for garlanding dogs.
description: Nepal's unique five-day Festival of Lights, where crows, dogs, cows, and siblings are each honored on successive days.
